name: CCAC City County Athletic Complex
description: Come play pickleball at CCAC City County Athletic Complex in Warsaw, IN! There are 7 courts. 4 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Kelly Park
description: Kelly Park is a place to play pickleball in Warsaw, IN. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: North Webster Community Center
description: North Webster Community Center is a place to play pickleball in North Webster, IN. There are 7 wood courts. 4 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Syracuse Community Center
description: Syracuse Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Syracuse, IN. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Warsaw Racquet Club
description: Warsaw Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in Warsaw, IN. There are 8 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Wawasee Airport
description: Wawasee Airport is a place to play pickleball in Syracuse, IN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Wawasee Middle School
description: Wawasee Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Syracuse, IN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Wawasee Pickleball Club
description: Wawasee Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Syracuse, IN. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, trainers or lessons, and a pro shop or equipment store. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Wellington Cottage
description: Wellington Cottage is a place to play pickleball in Syracuse, IN. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private.

name: Winona Lake Park
description: Winona Lake Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Winona Lake, IN. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like water and restrooms.
